1.loopIntro: September sunlight filters through the ginkgo leaves. I stand at the school gate, taking a deep breath — a new story begins here.
1.loopOutro: The first trial is over. The wind sweeps through the corridor, carrying away fallen leaves and a strange flutter in a corner of my heart...

2.loopIntro: October paints the campus in maple red. Walking the familiar path, I can't shake the feeling someone is behind me... I turn, but see only drifting leaves.
2.loopOutro: The second time down this road — the scenery hasn't changed, but some people's gazes seem to linger a little longer.

boss_0.intro: "...You again. Can you stop taking that corridor route?" (Looks away)
boss_0.defeatOutro: "...Whatever. Go wherever you want." (Voice barely audible)

boss_1.intro: "Hey! We meet again! This time I'm serious!" (Waves with a grin)
boss_1.defeatOutro: "Ugh... you won again! But losing to you isn't so bad, I guess?" (Scratches head)

boss_2.intro: "Ah, we meet again. This time, let me get a proper look at you." (Leans in slightly)
boss_2.defeatOutro: "You're even more remarkable than I imagined..."

boss_3.intro: "Second semester already. I hope your performance lives up to this academy." (Adjusts glasses)
boss_3.defeatOutro: "...Not bad. But don't let it go to your head." (Faint smile)

3.loopIntro: Festival lanterns line the corridors, and the air is sweet with caramel and osmanthus. Everyone is looking forward to tonight's fireworks — including me.
3.loopOutro: Fireworks bloom across the night sky and in my heart. The warmth of this evening will linger in my palms for a long, long time.

boss_0.intro: "School festivals... too noisy. But if you're here, maybe it's not so unbearable." (Looks down)
boss_0.defeatOutro: "...The fireworks were beautiful. Especially with you." (Voice almost a whisper)

boss_1.intro: "Happy festival! Don't leave tonight — I have something to tell you... under the fireworks!"
boss_1.defeatOutro: "Your smile is prettier than any firework... D-did I say something?!" (Ears turning red)

boss_2.intro: "School festival! The lights are beautiful, but they pale next to you."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "This night belongs to us, Chérie..." (Gently touches fingertips)

boss_3.intro: "I maintain order during the festival. But tonight... perhaps I can make an exception." (Loosens tie)
boss_3.defeatOutro: "Tonight's fireworks... and you — I'll remember both." (A rare softness)

4.loopIntro: The blizzard lockdown came without warning. Outside is a sea of white, yet the classroom feels warmer than ever — because some people chose to stay.
4.loopOutro: The storm will pass, but the one who draped his coat over my shoulders in the blizzard — I can never unsee him again.

boss_0.intro: "It's cold outside. ...Take my coat." (Doesn't look at her, hands over the coat)
boss_0.defeatOutro: "...Don't catch a cold. I'm not used to worrying about anyone. You're the first."

boss_1.intro: "A blizzard can't stop me! Wait right here — I'll get you hot cocoa!"
boss_1.defeatOutro: "Thank goodness you're okay... I-I ran so many trips to find you!" (Panting, nose bright red)

boss_2.intro: "The storm outside is fierce, but my heart is warmer when you're near."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "Stay with me... just a little longer." (Holds her hand tightly)

boss_3.intro: "Blizzard lockdown — all students return to dormitories. You... are the exception." (A pause)
boss_3.defeatOutro: "As principal, I ordered everyone to leave. But as someone else... I want you to stay."

5.loopIntro: The training camp's ocean breeze carries salt and freedom. Far from school rules, everyone seems to shed their masks — including those who never crack a smile.
5.loopOutro: The bonfire has burned out, but the starry sky remains wide awake. After tonight, we can never be "just classmates" again.

boss_0.intro: "...Don't walk alone at night. I'll walk you back during camp." (After a silence)
boss_0.defeatOutro: "Stars... I never found them beautiful. But tonight, because you're beside me."

boss_1.intro: "I'm in charge of the camp BBQ! But... could you help me taste if this is cooked?"
boss_1.defeatOutro: "Tonight's starry sky... I want to keep watching it with you, like this, forever." (Voice barely audible)

boss_2.intro: "Summer camp under the stars... C'est parfait, especially with you."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "Mon cœur, cette nuit je veux te dire... you are my summer."

boss_3.intro: "I'm responsible for camp discipline. But if you can't sleep... you can come find me."
boss_3.defeatOutro: "I've spent my life making rules, until I met you... now I'm willing to break them all."

6.loopIntro: On the cultural festival stage, everyone is playing someone else. But when the curtain falls and the makeup comes off — I only want you to see the real me.
6.loopOutro: Applause roars, but my world has narrowed to a single person. This confession is more real than any script.

boss_0.intro: "Cultural festivals... I'm not good at these. But if you're on stage, I'll be in the audience."
boss_0.defeatOutro: "I'm not good with pretty words, but... from now on, my eyes are only on you." (First time holding her gaze)

boss_1.intro: "The festival's grand finale — I'm ready! Will you be... my one and only audience?"
boss_1.defeatOutro: "I don't want to be just your friend anymore... I-I want to be the one who holds your hand!"

boss_2.intro: "On this stage, I want to perform the most important scene of my life — with you."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "Curtain call? Non. Our story is just beginning, Chérie."

boss_3.intro: "Everything about the festival requires my approval. But there's one thing... I want to tell you myself, no approval needed."
boss_3.defeatOutro: "You're the first person I've willingly surrendered control to. I... surrender." (Takes off glasses)

7.loopIntro: The train rolls past mountains and fields, the scenery ever-changing. But the person sitting across from me never looks away. The school trip is the perfect excuse — an excuse to be closer to you.
7.loopOutro: The sunset on the journey home paints half the sky red, and the face of the one beside me. What he whispered in my ear was warmer than the sunset.

boss_0.intro: "Trips... I don't like them. But if it's with you, maybe it's worth a try."
boss_0.defeatOutro: "I've been thinking about one thing this whole trip... When we go back, can we keep walking together like this?"

boss_1.intro: "School trip! I'm great at getting lost — but this time, I only want to follow you."
boss_1.defeatOutro: "This trip taught me one thing: no matter where I go, as long as you're beside me, it's the best destination."

boss_2.intro: "Voyage... the French say travel reveals the heart. And mine is clear."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "Wherever the road leads, I want to walk it with you, always." (Fingers intertwined)

boss_3.intro: "The meaning of travel is escaping the everyday. And my everyday... has been completely upended by you."
boss_3.defeatOutro: "I thought controlling everything was strength. Until I met you, I learned... giving your heart willingly is the truest power."

8.loopIntro: The night before graduation, the campus is steeped in farewell. Three years of memories flash by like a lantern show — and the brightest moments all have you in them. Tonight, I refuse to leave any regrets.
8.loopOutro: Graduation isn't the end — it's a new beginning. But wherever I go, my heart beats only for you — from our first meeting, to forever.

boss_0.intro: "The night before graduation... I've never been reluctant to leave anywhere. But this time... I don't want to go, because you're here."
boss_0.defeatOutro: "From now on, every graduation season, I'll be right here waiting for you. ...Always." (Eyes glistening)

boss_1.intro: "The night before graduation, there's something I have to tell you — even if we go our separate ways tomorrow, I need you to know!"
boss_1.defeatOutro: "No matter how far apart we are... I'll always run back to you. Because you're my destination — forever!" (Hands clasped tight)

boss_2.intro: "Graduation is not goodbye. It's the beginning of our forever, mon amour."
boss_2.defeatOutro: "Je t'aime... from the first hello to the last star. Always." (Foreheads touching)

boss_3.intro: "Three years. I thought I was cultivating you, but without realizing... you redefined me." (Loosens tie)
boss_3.defeatOutro: "I've spent my life making rules, but tonight I only want to do one thing — let you know you are my one and only exception. Forever."
